problem id: 7973c1b7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10011001 -> 11011001
  01001011 -> 00010010
  10010010 -> 00110101
  10000011 -> 00110001
  00101101 -> 00001011
  00000001 -> 10111011
  10110011 -> 11110001
  10100001 -> 00111001
  11001101 -> 10001001
  00000011 -> 00110011

query: 00101110
predicted answer: 11000111
